Title: Berti, Luciano
Subject Area: Italian (culture or style)|Italian Renaissance-Baroque styles|Mannerist (Renaissance-Baroque style)|Renaissance
Overview: Mannerism; Renaissance Italy; studied the studiolo of Francesco I, Grand-Duke of Tuscany.
Selected Bibliography: Il principe dello studiolo. Francesco I dei Medici e la fine del Rinascimento fiorentino. Firenze: Edam, 1967.
